title.rendered: AMI Announces Redfish 1.5 Support in Aptio V and MegaRAC SP-X

content.rendered:
Today, AMI announced its full support for the Redfish® 1.5 specification from the DMTF, in its Aptio® V UEFI BIOS Firmware and MegaRAC® SP-X BMC Remote Management Firmware – the most widely used solution in the market today.

Redfish is an open industry-standard specification and schema designed to meet the expectations of end-users for simple and secure management of modern scalable platform hardware. It is grounded in modern technologies including a RESTful interface and utilizes JSON and OData to help customers integrate solutions within their existing tool chains.

Redfish® is a registered trademark of the DMTF in the US and other countries.
